Zep"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Import memories from ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.getzep.com","children":"Zep"}]," into Mnemosyne. Zep is a cloud-hosted enterprise memory platform with a temporal knowledge graph. Because Zep has no bulk export API, extraction happens session by session."]}],"\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a"],["$L1b"],"$L1c"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@1d"]},null,false,"$@1d"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L1e",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$1f",["$L20"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"avR8AX1ZmJ678HIyJzpPX"}

7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"One Command"}]
8:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"hermes mnemosyne import --from zep --api-key sk-xxx\n"}]}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"The importer automatically discovers all users, iterates their sessions, and pulls memory, facts, and summaries from each."}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What Gets Imported"}]
b:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Session Messages"}]," → Working memory with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"zep_message\""}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]," from the message sender"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Entity Facts"}]," → Working memory with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"zep_fact\""}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Session Summaries"}]," → Working memory with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"zep_summary\""}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal Graph Facts"}]," → Mnemosyne triples (via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_triple_add"}],")"]}],"\n"]}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Options"}]
d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Filter by specific user\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --api-key sk-xxx --user-id alice\n\n# Limit sessions (useful for large accounts)\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --api-key sk-xxx --max-sessions 50\n\n# Dry run\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --api-key sk-xxx --dry-run\n"}]}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Important: No Bulk Export"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":["Zep has no ",["$","code",null,{"children":"export_all()"}]," or bulk download endpoint. The importer works by:"]}]
10:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Listing all users via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"client.user.list_ordered()"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"For each user, listing all sessions"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["For each session, calling ",["$","code",null,{"children":"client.memory.get(session_id)"}]," to pull messages, facts, and summaries"]}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":["This means extraction time scales with your session count. If you have thousands of sessions, use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"--max-sessions"}]," to limit the run, or process users in batches."]}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Agentic Fallback"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":"If the Zep importer cannot extract everything (network limits, API constraints), use the agentic fallback:"}]
14:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Generate a migration script for your Zep data\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --generate-script\n\n# Generate instructions for your AI agent to handle the migration\nhermes mnemosyne import --from zep --agentic\n"}]}]
15:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"SDK Dependencies"}]
16:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install zep-cloud\n"}]}]
17:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Identity Mapping"}]
18:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Zep Source"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne Field"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["Message ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"role"}]," ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"human"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"author_type"}]," = ",["$","code",null,{"children":"human"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"role"}]," / ",["$","code",null,{"children":"role_type"}]," → ",["$","code",null,{"children":"assistant"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"agent"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"author_type"}]," = ",["$","code",null,{"children":"agent"}]]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["Message ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user_id"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"author_id"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["Session ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user_id"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"channel_id"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"timestamp preserved in metadata"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Facts (entity triples)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne triples"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Session summary"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"zep_summary\""}]]}]]}]]}]]}]
19:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Programmatic Import"}]
1a:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\nfrom mnemosyne.core.importers import ZepImporter\n\nmnemosyne = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"migration\")\n\nimporter = ZepImporter(\n    api_key=\"sk-xxx\",\n    user_id=\"alice\",          # optional filter\n    max_sessions=50,          # limit to recent sessions\n)\n\nresult = importer.run(mnemosyne, dry_run=True)\n\nprint(f\"Imported {result.imported} of {result.total}\")\nprint(f\"Skipped: {result.skipped}, Failed: {result.failed}\")\n"}]}]
